历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for Physics Category approximately 1952→2156→2236→1606→1570, shifting backward year by year from 2021 to 2023, then moving significantly forward by 630 places to 1606 in 2024, and continuing to move slightly forward to 1570 in 2025, showing a forward trend in the last two years, with a baseline of about 1570 in 2025; in-province enrollment plan for Physics Category: 166 in 2021, 160 in 2022, 151 in 2023, 149 in 2024, 149 in 2025, showing a gradual slight decrease then stabilization; 2026 plan 147, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.3%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (C9 League member); Soft Science main ranking stable at 10th from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities, highly attractive to high-scoring students; 2023 reputation slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues), 2024 slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors, officially clarified as rumors), 2025–2026 reputation files have no records of Xi'an Jiaotong University; Douyin heat total ranking 24th (relatively hot), comprehensive heat about 1.84 million, short video exposure at upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Fifth round discipline evaluation A+ level: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering; A level: Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Marxist Theory; A- level: Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology. A total of 13 A- and above disciplines, strong engineering strength, highly matching with Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended) and other Xi'an Jiaotong University flagship majors have high social popularity, attracting high-scoring students; in-province Physics Category examinees: 216,000 in 2021 → 363,000 in 2025, continuous growth; 2026 total examinees 609,800, estimated about 365,000 based on recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%, slightly increased from 2025, intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not Hebei province), cross-province enrollment; university_home_province is Shaanxi, no local preference advantage, but as a C9 prestigious university recruiting nationwide, regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the forward trend of rankings in the last two years (significant forward movement of 630 places in 2024 then stabilization in 2025), slight reduction in 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (147, -1.3%), slight increase in in-province Physics Category examinees, and high social popularity of flagship majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 1570, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly, with rankings moving slightly forward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1557, range 1380–1734.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 742 → 815 → 712 → 832 → 1005, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it moved back by 173 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward movement of about 293 places over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1005. 2. 【Enrollment Plan】The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 3 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. After expansion from 2021 to 2023, it stabilized; the 2026 plan is 12, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 7.7%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (C9 League member); Soft Science main ranking stable at 10th from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities. However, Xi'an Jiaotong University is strong in engineering, with a relatively small liberal arts scale; reputation was slightly negative in 2023 (dormitory commuting issues), slightly negative in 2024 (teacher ethics rumors), and no records for 2025–2026; Douyin popularity total ranking 24th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.84 million, overall attention moderately high; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Xi'an Jiaotong University has few liberal arts-related disciplines, with Marxist Theory rated A, Foreign Languages and Literature not independently rated; Law, Public Administration, Philosophy, Sociology, etc., have not reached A- or above, so liberal arts advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (differentiation and wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature (recommended) and other liberal arts majors have differentiated social popularity; the number of History Category candidates in the province was 202,000 in 2021 → 244,000 in 2025, continuously increasing; total candidates in 2026 is 609,800, estimated at about 245,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 40.2%, a slight increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not Hebei province), so it is cross-provincial enrollment; university_home_province is Shaanxi, with no local preference advantage; the number of History Category enrollments is small (12), the candidate base is small, and ranking fluctuations are relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of rankings in recent years, the slight reduction in the 2026 History Category plan (12, -7.7%), a slight increase in provincial History Category candidates, and the lack of prominent liberal arts advantages at Xi'an Jiaotong University, competition is expected to continue intensifying based on the 2025 baseline of 1005, with rankings continuing to move back; the predicted minimum ranking is about 959, with a range of 850–1068.
